title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 271.150 - Amount for keeping stray
text:
271.150.  Amount for keeping stray. — If the owner and taker-up cannot agree in the amount for keeping said stray, it shall be decided by the associate circuit judge before whom the stray is proved, who shall take into consideration both the cost of keeping and the use and service of such stray.
(RSMo 1939 § 14512) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12838; 1919 § 4328; 1909 § 829
